title.en: Non-DLT SMS Gateway India — Send Transactional SMS Instantly — StartMessaging

description.en: Send transactional SMS in India without your own DLT registration. Use pre-registered compliant routes at just ₹0.25/SMS. Get API keys and start sending in 5 minutes.

subtitle.en: StartMessaging uses pre-registered DLT compliant routes for transactional SMS. No entity registration, no header approvals, no template submissions — just sign up and start sending at ₹0.25/SMS.

body.en: Traditional SMS pathways require complex portal registrations and manual template hashing. StartMessaging routes your alerts through pre-registered templates seamlessly, maintaining compliance while providing developers with instant setup capabilities.

heading.en: 3 Steps to Send SMS Without DLT

description.en: Create your account in 30 seconds. No DLT registration needed. Get your API key instantly from the dashboard.
Use our simple REST API with code samples in cURL, Node.js, Python, PHP, Java, and Go. Send your first test message in under 5 minutes.
Send transactional SMS (OTPs, alerts, confirmations) at ₹0.25/message across all Indian networks with 99.9% delivery and sub-second speed.
Sent through legally approved transactional templates registered on the national DLT blockchain. Fully compliant with all telecom directives.
Bypass virtual operators. We connect directly to Tier-1 telecom gateways for maximum speed and deliverability.
Integrate in minutes. Features simple JSON request and response models, robust headers authentication, and detailed logs.
Monitor and verify every single message status via our real-time delivery tracking endpoint.

question.en: Is it legal to send SMS without DLT registration?

answer.en: Yes. StartMessaging operates through pre-registered DLT routes with authorized telecom operators. Your messages are sent through our already-registered sender IDs and templates, which are fully TRAI-compliant. This is the same approach used by major banks and payment platforms in India.

question.en: What types of messages can I send without DLT?

answer.en: You can send transactional messages only — OTP codes, order confirmations, shipping alerts, payment receipts, and account notifications. Promotional or marketing SMS require individual DLT registration per TRAI regulations.

subtext.en: No DLT registration. ₹0.25/SMS. Free plan available.
